name: XX-Saber Garsem
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＸＸ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ダブルエックス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－セイバー ガルセム
desc: When this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard by a card effect, add 1 "X-Saber" monster from your Deck to your hand. This card gains 200 ATK for each face-up "X-Saber" monster you control.
mnst_eff: When this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard by a card effect, add 1 "X-Saber" monster from your Deck to your hand. This card gains 200 ATK for each face-up "X-Saber" monster you control.
eff: When this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard by a card effect, add 1 "X-Saber" monster from your Deck to your hand. This card gains 200 ATK for each face-up "X-Saber" monster you control.
